stories.title: Shohei Ohtani — 6 Hitless Innings AND a Leadoff Home Run vs. the Rockies (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Shohei Ohtani on Thursday night:

6 hitless innings. 7 strikeouts. 99 pitches.
Also: a leadoff home run. 424 feet. Dead center.

Dodgers win 4-1. ERA drops to 0.82.

No pitcher has done that — homer AND 6 hitless innings — since 2015.

#Dodgers #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The last Dodger to homer and throw 6 hitless innings in the same game?

Don Drysdale. 1959.

67 years later, Shohei Ohtani did it Thursday.

0.82 ERA. Nine starts. The most singular player in baseball. #Dodgers #MLB

article.headline: Shohei Ohtani: 6 Hitless Innings and a Leadoff HR in the Same Game — First Pitcher Since 2015

stories.title: Cam Schlittler — The Yankees Ace Leading the AL Cy Young Race (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Cam Schlittler, Yankees, through 12 starts:

7-2. 1.50 ERA. 81 Ks in 72 IP.
AL leader: ERA, WHIP (.86), BAA (.183), fWAR (2.7), FIP (1.78).
Fastball usage: 90.8%.

Leads AL Cy Young poll in first-place votes. The Yankees have an ace. #Yankees #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Cam Schlittler throws a fastball 90.8% of the time.

Not 40%. Not 60%. 90.8%.

And hitters still can't touch him. 1.50 ERA. AL Cy Young frontrunner.

Baseball is weird and wonderful. #Yankees #MLB

article.headline: Cam Schlittler Is 7-2 With a 1.50 ERA and Leading the AL Cy Young Race in 2026

stories.title: Seattle Mariners Take First Place in the AL West for the First Time (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
The Seattle Mariners swept the A's (9-1 finale) and are in FIRST PLACE in the AL West for the first time this season.

Every team in this division has been under .500 at some point in 2026.

The most wide-open division in baseball has a new leader. #Mariners #MLB

article.headline: Mariners Sweep A's and Take First Place in the AL West for the First Time in 2026

stories.title: White Sox 28-27 — The Most Stunning Turnaround in Baseball (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The Chicago White Sox went 41-121 in 2024. MLB-record 121 losses.

They are 28-27 in 2026 with an AL Wild Card spot.

Murakami: 20 HRs, tied for the AL lead. Multiple contributors.

Baseball's most stunning turnaround is real. #WhiteSox #MLB

article.headline: From 121 Losses to Wild Card: The White Sox Are 28-27 in 2026 and Baseball's Biggest Story

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:

**Social Image (1080×1350, 4:5 vertical):**

stories.title: José Ramírez and the 300/300 Club — Nine Home Runs From Baseball History (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
José Ramírez stole his 300th career base on May 2.

He's now 9 HRs from 300 career home runs.

The 300/300 club is one of the most exclusive in baseball history.

Willie Mays. Barry Bonds. Alex Rodriguez.

Ramírez is next in line. #Guardians #MLB

article.headline: José Ramírez Is Nine Home Runs From the 300/300 Club — One of Baseball's Most Exclusive Groups
